title: Eager British Corn Welsh Rarebit
description: A festive, grass‑kissed cheese sauce with an egg wash and ice‑bath shock, served over buttered toast for a kosher‑friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C and position a rack in the middle.
Butter each slice of bread until the surface is golden and set aside.
In a medium saucepan combine milk, white wine and paprika and heat until steaming.
Gradually stir in grated cheddar, Gruyère and parmesan until the mixture is smooth and creamy.
Whisk in the egg yolk and a pinch of kosher salt; season with pepper and stir until fully incorporated.
Remove the saucepan from heat and pour the sauce into a heat‑proof bowl, then immerse the bowl in an ice bath to rapidly chill and set the sauce.
While the sauce is cooling toast the buttered bread slices in the oven until crisp and golden.
Once the sauce has thickened spoon a generous amount onto each toasted slice.
Garnish immediately with chopped parsley and an optional pinch of smoked paprika.
Serve the rarebit immediately while still warm, accompanied by a fresh green salad if desired.
